name: zigxll
description: Write Excel custom functions in zig

releases.name: v0.2.5
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Cross platform by @AlexJReid in https://github.com/AlexJReid/zigxll/pull/1

releases.name: v0.2.4
releases.body:
- fixes botched release numbering
- optional parameter support with default pattern
- range fixes
- example functions (ZigDouble, ZigMatrix, ZigNot, ZigPower, ZigSumRange)
- BOOL support
- matrix [][]f64 support (numeric ranges)
- added demo funcs in builtin_functions.zig for above
- performance boost
